testcase.name: test_cluster_info_has_required_fields

failure.message: AssertionError: Cluster missing 'cluster_id' field assert 'cluster_id' in {'border_color': 'rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.8)', 'centroid': {'latitude': -26.775572, 'longitude': 153.092217}, 'fill_color': 'rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.25)', 'id': 0, ...}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_cluster_first_upgrade.py:215: in test_cluster_info_has_required_fields assert field in first_cluster, f"Cluster missing '{field}' field" E AssertionError: Cluster missing 'cluster_id' field E assert 'cluster_id' in {'border_color': 'rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.8)', 'centroid': {'latitude': -26.775572, 'longitude': 153.092217}, 'fill_color': 'rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.25)', 'id': 0, ...}
